name: Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the secret lemonade by mixing 1 packet of Kool-Aid Lemonade mix, 1/2 cup sugar, and 1 can of frozen lemonade concentrate with 2 quarts water.
2. Pour the prepared lemonade into a punch bowl.
3. Add the orange sherbet to the punch bowl.
4. Carefully pour the Sprite, 7-Up, or ginger ale over the sherbet in the punch bowl.
5. When the soda hits the sherbet, it will create a foam that will float on top of the punch.
6. Garnish with lemon slices if desired and serve immediately.
